title: Algerian Aubergine Fries
description: A tasty Algerian-inspired snack made with crispy aubergine fries. Serve with a side of sweet chilli sauce for added flavor.
instructions: Slice the aubergine into long, thin strips.
Heat the stir in a deep frying pan over medium heat.
Dredge the aubergine strips in the fry mixture, coating evenly.
Carefully add the coated aubergine to the hot stir and fry until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the fries from the oil with a slotted spoon and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
